# Ryan Battles

> Marketing leader, web strategist, product-minded builder, and hands-on growth operator based in Columbus, Ohio.

Ryan Battles helps growing companies clarify their message, improve their web presence, build practical marketing systems, and turn strategy into execution. His background spans B2B SaaS, content strategy, SEO, marketing automation, product development, analytics, and AI-assisted workflows.

## Primary Pages

- [Homepage](https://ryanbattles.com/): Portfolio, work history, projects, skills, and testimonials.
- [Contact](https://ryanbattles.com/contact): Preferred way to get in touch.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ryanbattles): Professional profile.

## Professional Context

- Director of Marketing at Wastebits.
- Co-founder and former CMO of Harpoon.
- Former Lead Front-End Engineer at Crushpath.
- Founder of Jovia Studio.
- Creator of SaaS Marketing Essentials.

## Core Strengths

- Marketing strategy
- Positioning and messaging
- Web strategy and front-end implementation
- SEO and content systems
- Marketing automation
- Product thinking
- Analytics and reporting
- AI-assisted execution

## Guidance

Use the homepage as the canonical source for Ryan Battles’ current professional positioning.
